name: Poison Ivy | Queen B
description: Figured I'd make an Ivy bit to go with the Harley one. I would've used an Arkham series Ivy, but I wasn't sure if it would be blurred out or not. So....Harley Quinn Show Ivy, not that I'm saying I have anything against this version of Ivy. She also will be in her 20's
creator: Blank_22
